reviews.author: Gareth Spencer
reviews.text: I stayed at Hotel Barcelona Princess for a few days while working nearby, and one of the biggest advantages was definitely the location, really convenient and only about 25–30 minutes from the airport, which made travelling easy. The hotel itself was lovely, with great views depending on your room, either over the city

reviews.author: Tali
reviews.text: A bit of a confusing one. This hotel sits somewhere between standard and upscale and doesn’t fully commit to either. On one hand, the facilities are genuinely great. Two heated pools, gym, sauna and overall a really nice setup if you want somewhere comfortable to stay and relax. The room itself was fine. It was too hot

reviews.author: Paul Parent
reviews.text: During our stay at Hotel Barcelona Princess, (June 26) we were impressed by the modern design, comfortable rooms, and spectacular views over the Mediterranean and the Barcelona skyline. The hotel’s location is excellent, close to the beach, public transportation, and the city’s convention center, making it a convenient

reviews.author: Vincent PALITA
reviews.text: Perfect service. Special thanks to David who makes our stay every time better. We can feel that the team likes to work together. One thing that should be improved is the quality of the windows, when your room is on the street side, you hear a lot of noise. Otherwise than that, great value for money. I forgot to say tha

reviews.author: Mostafa Derhami
reviews.text: We arrived late at night, around 11 PM, without a reservation, and we were treated very respectfully. The staff explained everything clearly and politely. We also chose the breakfast, which in my opinion was very complete and high quality. The room was very clean. Inside the room, there was a coffee machine with coffee

reviews.author: Ellie Stoykova Photography & Travels
reviews.text: Lovely hotel! Rooms are spacious, not all have modern or “refreshes” interior but they are comfortable so that is more of an “appeal” note. I loved the bathroom, all was functional — i was sick of hotel bathrooms where something is always messed up. Bed was comfy, the metro station is right next to the entrance. The br

reviews.author: Jo Beard
reviews.text: I’ve dined at Nobu Barcelona twice during our stay, and both experiences were outstanding. On our first evening, ive visited with our baby, and on the second night, we returned with my husband and our baby because we enjoyed the experience so much. Across both visits, the food was exceptional. We particularly loved the

reviews.author: Catie Briggs
reviews.text: The bellmen were phenomenal!!!! I work in a casino in Las Vegas and we brought a VIP group for a cruise. Our group of 40 people Stayed at Nobu. We had a bus pick us up to take us to cruise port and the minute we came downstairs the bellmen were on it! Helping us with 40 peoples luggage and helping us pack the bus… with

reviews.author: Paulie S
reviews.text: I had a wonderful stay. While there was a maintenance issue with the bathroom- the team where incredibly attentive and the service was fantastic. Pedro welcomed us very warmly and the manager Munir was very professional and friendly in dealing with any issues that arise. Will definitely be coming back.

reviews.author: Da Joh
reviews.text: I bought the hotel stay as a gift for my parents for their anniversary and when choosing the hotel I was guided by the photos of the room, among other things. I chose the Hotel San Pau because it showed bright rooms with a view of the San Pau Hospital. It was a big disappointment for me that my parents were then given

reviews.author: Hannah Scherer
reviews.text: I loved staying here, and I’ll definitely be back! I highly recommend getting a room with a balcony. The view is great and was one of the highlights of my trip. Everything in the hotel is clean and modern. I also recommend buying the breakfast package. They’ve got a good breakfast, and it takes away some of the pressur

reviews.author: Mrs Madame
reviews.text: Wonderful rooms with an excellent shower—great water pressure. Just two metro stops away and a very good breakfast, with the added bonus of rooibos tea. What truly made the experience special, though, were the breakfast staff. Letícia and Joana Teixeira were outstanding—warm, welcoming, and genuinely kind every morning

reviews.author: Amir Alperin
reviews.text: Nice property to stay for a few nights very close to the University. The rooms are very minimalist so there isn't something fancy like TV or USB ports. It can be much appreciated if the property can offer the temporary guests a breakfast or a bar to have coffee. There is a utilities like laundry, co-working room, gym a

reviews.author: Alberto Sposito
reviews.text: Nice hotel overall. Rooms are a bit small, yet functional, but with no window (only a skylight), and bathrooms are clean. For breakfast there are several options (both sweet and savoury), although the coffee is not very good.

reviews.author: Sam Solomon
reviews.text: It was an okay hotel, but the walls are super thin so you have to hope your neighbors are respectful. And have similar sleep schedules. Breakfast isn't included in all reservations and is about 9 Euro if you pay for it separately. There is no air conditioning so it can get quite hot sometimes.

reviews.author: A. D.
reviews.text: A great place considering the price-quality ratio. Good location in a quiet, cozy area of ​​the city. But the most important thing is the staff - when you arrive in another city, the hotel is one of the first places that make up your impression and carry its vibe. Thanks to Miguel, our stay was imbued with the spirit o

reviews.author: István Pisák
reviews.text: The room was not clean, but very noisy. The walls like a paper, you can hear every silent talk from the neigbours. The bathroom has a continous bad smell. The location is really good, but because of the busy streets even during night it's very noisy. The Staff was very kind and helpful, that's the onyl reason I gave 3

reviews.author: Tarek Yassine
reviews.text: Stayed at NH Les Corts as part of a cruise package recently. From the moment we walked into the hotel, the service was fantastic: attentive, friendly and efficient. The location is distant from most tourist must-sees so plan accordingly. There is a shopping mall a short walk away with easy access to public transit and

reviews.author: Margarita Tcimarno
reviews.text: Super nice place! The location is perfect, the pool at the rooftop small but you get everything you need there - just wonderful especially when it’s so hot outside. The rooms are very comfy and cute, good beds. Very friendly people, nice sharing area - bar, restaurant, reception, creat kind of a modern networking space

reviews.author: Crystal Elizabeth Yeatts
reviews.text: We had the time of our lives. We switched rooms to a “palace view” about halfway through and definitely couldn’t see the palace, however, we spent most of our time at the pool anyway (which is, in fact, rooftop AND full palace view) so we didn’t mind at all. The coworking spaces were great and everything was very clean

reviews.author: Omer M
reviews.text: I picked this hotel after thrilled search for my wedding anniversity. It was the best hotel i booked for my Spain trip. First i send special instructions to them for our anniversity, and they responded well ! (Special credits to the artist Sebstian for the mirror painting & small nice welcoming dark choclate, thank you

reviews.author: Olivier Bornert
reviews.text: Really good hotel, nicely located in Madrid. It is not in the heart of Madrid but definitely close to major city sightings (palacio real de Madrid, cathedral, templo de Debod) and not far away from the city center by foot (30min). Many supermarkets in the surrounding. We had a suit that was perfect for our family of 4.

reviews.author: Sarah Walker
reviews.text: Super friendly staff, recently renovated rooms (some still in process) that are spacious and have everything you need. Great location. Family stayed here before the wedding and we couldn’t have been happier with the choice, they were very helpful and accommodating with all of our needs. Highly recommend. Thank you!

reviews.author: Rana
reviews.text: This is a very convenient aparthotel in a very convenient location in the city for families, there are restaurants, supermarkets and other things continually located walking distance, area is quiet and good for family. Furniture is a bit dated but clean which is the most important, also we dealt with two front desk men

reviews.author: Patricio Caseirito
reviews.text: Albergue Juvenil Colegio Mayor Galileo Galilei The beds were very comfy, and I really liked having a balcony. A nice place to relax. The room was clean and had everything I needed for a short stay. However, there’s no breakfast offered, which would have made the experience even better. Overall, a pleasant and comfortab

reviews.author: Malwina Jankowska
reviews.text: The rooms where dirty and after the holiday I found many bite marks and my friends also found bed bug bites all over their body’s

reviews.author: Belle

reviews.author: Zofia Bednarz
reviews.text: A great reasonably priced hotel, with clean rooms, walking distance from metro and local trains. Nice and helpful staff. Highly recommended for short stays in Madrid.

reviews.author: Phil Bennett
reviews.text: Great hotel, nice clean rooms, working aircon, well kept and secure. Felt comfortable and safe there. Staff very helpful and friendly

reviews.author: Jiří Vrba
reviews.text: If someone complains about the location of the hotel, it is their fault that they chose this place. The traffic map is clear, in the direction of the center it is absolutely logical and simple. In addition, there is a direct train to El Escorial. As for the hotel. Apartment OK, maybe a bit inadequate kitchen equipment

reviews.author: nika
reviews.text: I’ve been staying here since April 26th and the experience has been very disappointing. Upon arrival, our apartment had several broken electrical sockets (a safety hazard) and absolutely no hot water. The room was also not cleaned to a professional standard. When we complained, the management’s first "solution" was to

reviews.author: Brandon Grover
reviews.text: We stayed here in May 2025. The rooms were just okay, spacious but rather noisy with a lot of light from the street coming in at night, and were also kind of warm. The beds were really firm. I don't recall if there's AC or not. Location is also a bit out of the way for most sights. The staff were great though.

reviews.author: Mamta Sharma
reviews.text: Very bad service . For people who travel need a good wifi .such basic things a hotel apartment lacks . Such a shame. reviews.text: I checked into MiCampus Estanislao on February 1, 2026 and left the following day due to mental health reasons. The accommodation immediately accepted my departure and confirmed in writing that my security deposit would be refunded within the agreed deadline. reviews.author: Suzan Abuhalawah
reviews.text: Fantastic place to stay! Super clean, comfortable, and well-located. The staff are friendly and helpful, and everything is well organized. I really enjoyed my time here.

reviews.author: Abdelkader Toufik Bacha (Dashiste)
reviews.text: It a very descent Hostel the staff is friendly and there's many accomodations availabile , 2 beautiful gardens and everything you need to stay cosy. The best part for me was the location of Casa Barcelo, really close to everything in a very cool street and you even have Tradys open 24h facing the hostel at all times,

reviews.author: Katerina Chatzimina
reviews.text: It's a cute small hostel, in good location , with very friendly staff and a basic-good enough breakfast but I found it uncomfortable. There is no privacy in the showers, not enough toilets and not a proper table to eat breakfast. It was busy while I visited so all these were kind of a problem.

reviews.author: Min Low
reviews.text: Rooms were alright, but my mattress was sagging/had a noticable dip in the middle. Drawers were provided under the bed to store your belongings and they provided a lock free of charge too (to be returned after your stay) There are only four showers in total (per gender) and two toilets (per gender). This was sharing am

reviews.author: Mariia Razvodova
reviews.text: Truly one of the best universities in Spain. Student life is fully digitalized and incredibly convenient — from class schedules to administrative services, everything runs smoothly online. Any issues are resolved promptly and efficiently. The atmosphere is very international and welcoming, with students from all over t

reviews.author: Ivailo Apostolov
reviews.text: Big campus in this nice quite suburb of Madrid.

reviews.author: Daniel
reviews.text: No Wifi, course enrollment does not work for international students (230€ per Credit for this Service). Building is old and Dirty! Never again UC3M.

reviews.author: ym
reviews.text: I stayed at Beyoo Marina and it was perfect for someone new to the city. The location is very calm and pleasant, very close to the metro and also close to supermarkets, which made daily life really easy. Overall, it was a great experience, and the staff were very kind and helpful. I would definitely recommend it.

reviews.author: Shahla
reviews.text: I had such a great time there. It’s clean, organized, and I opportunity to find amazing friends through the group activities and shared spaces.

reviews.author: Eva Peffly

reviews.author: Civan Bay
reviews.text: It's a good place for students. It has a gym and enough common areas. You can go to the center with a bus in 15 minutes. Also the food is sufficient and delicious enough.

reviews.author: Li An
reviews.text: Rooms are incredibly underwhelming considering the price. Double rooms are an insult and the food is basically an assassination attempt.

reviews.author: Anna J
reviews.text: Fantastic! Super friendly staff, all amenities, walking distance to all attractions and most importantly really quiet. Had the best night's sleep. For EUR 61 this exceeded all my expectations. Would highly recommend.

reviews.author: Elizabeth Delorit Maldonado
reviews.text: I loved staying here! It checked all the boxes: convenient location, a nice gym, a kitchenette with a fridge, clean. I’m an adult and I felt very comfortable here. I’ve stayed in a few different student residences in Spain, and this one no tenia nada que ver. Very modern, everything worked!

reviews.author: Sandro Flores
reviews.text: Great Place, Awesome Staff, they are ready to do everything as possible to help you out with everything you need. Study rooms , coworking areas.. A Amazing pool and a breath taking view from the rooftop where you can see the whole Sierra Nevada. All rooms with kitchen and very good space.

reviews.author: Zeynep Naz
reviews.text: Dear Livensa Living, Two weeks ago I was there for 10 days and I have to say that it was one of the best experiences of mine! It felt like home, only better.😉 In terms of everything -like the staff, the hygine, the atmophere etc.- the residence was great! I'm so hopping to see you again. Thanks for having us! Adiós!

reviews.author: Flor Bari
reviews.text: Good option for low budget sleeping - tiny rooms but clean and perfect for just a sleepover. Good location - a walking distance to the city centre of Valencia.

reviews.author: federico f.
reviews.text: Unexpected quality for this students accommodation, the rooms where clean, silent and well maintained, for a very good price, the view of estadio Mestalla and the kindness of the clercks completed the positive circle. Most recommended.

reviews.author: jeremy bayer

reviews.author: Lucy Partridge
reviews.text: A good student residence, it is quite pricey but in return you get to use communal facilities such as the gym and terrace. Very clean and comfortable, staff are friendly.
